data.title: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu Announces Successful Strike
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced that the country has successfully launched its first strike. This development marks a significant moment in Israel's defense strategy. Further details about the operation were not disclosed.

data.title: CFTC Acting Chair Reaffirms Commitment to Cryptocurrency Regulation
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cointelegraph reports that Caroline Pham, the Acting Chair of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), emphasized that the agency will not ease cryptocurrency regulations despite the Trump administration's promises to support the crypto industry. Pham stated that while the CFTC supports innovation and growth, this does not grant immunity from regulatory oversight. She clarified that the focus is not on criminalizing asset classes or technologies but on addressing issues such as lies, deception, and theft.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows Amid Market Activity
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data from SoSoValue indicates that Ethereum spot ETFs experienced a substantial net inflow of $112 million on June 12, Eastern Time. The Blackrock ETF ETHA led the inflows with $102 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $5.236 billion. Fidelity's ETF FETH followed with a net inflow of $10.8319 million, accumulating a historical total of $1.603 billion.

As of the latest report, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $10.756 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio of 3.38% compared to Ethereum's total market capitalization. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $3.857 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$112 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 19 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 12, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$112 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$102 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$5.236 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$10.8319 million. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached US$1.603 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is US$10.756 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) is 3.38%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$3.857 billion.

data.title: Trump: Iran can't have a nuclear bomb
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fox News reporter reported that US President Trump said that it is impossible for Iran to have a nuclear bomb and we hope to return to the negotiation table. (Jinshi)

data.title: Crypto Trader Denies Liquidation Claims
data.description: According to Foresight News, crypto trader James Wynn has responded to reports by Lookonchain alleging that his account was liquidated. Wynn dismissed these claims as false, stating, "Fake news, I was not liquidated. This is not my account."

data.title: Spot gold rose 1.65% on the day, and the XAUm TVL of the gold token on the RWA platform of Matrixport Group hit a new high
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News shows that the spot gold price broke through $3,400/ounce today, up $55, with a daily maximum increase of more than 1.65%, and gold-related assets also rose accordingly. On-chain data shows that the trading volume of the gold token XAUm hit a record high, with a total of 12,411 troy ounces of gold assets under management. Since the launch of XAUm, the spot gold price has risen by more than 37%.
XAUm is a gold token issued by Matrixdock, a real asset (RWA) tokenization platform under the Matrixport Group. It is anchored to LBMA standard gold with a purity of 99.99%, and supports the redemption of physical gold in the real world. At present, XAUm has a top 3 on-chain adoption rate. As the marketization of XAUm becomes more mature, Matrixdock will continue to promote more precious metals on the chain to create a precious metal transaction chain aggregation.

data.title: Iran's Foreign Ministry: The United States will be responsible for the consequences of Israel's adventurous behavior
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Iran's Foreign Ministry said that as Israel's main supporter, the United States will be responsible for the consequences of Israel's adventurous behavior. Israel's attack could not have been carried out without the help of the United States. (Jinshi)

data.title: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu: First strike was a success
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu said that we have successfully launched the first strike. (Jinshi)

data.title: James Wynn denies existence of new wallet, insists he didn't lose $1.7 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News James Wynn posted on the X platform denying that his account was liquidated and lost $2 million, saying that the address was not his account. 
According to previous news, several on-chain analysts said that the long positions of BTC (40x leverage) and PEPE (10x leverage) opened by James Wynn's new wallet have accumulated losses of $1.7 million and still have a floating loss of $2 million.

data.title: Israel has launched five rounds of air strikes on Iran
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that the Israeli Army Radio quoted military sources as saying that the Israeli army has launched five rounds of air strikes on Iran. (CCTV International News)

data.title: Acting Chairman of the U.S. CFTC: Compliance requirements for the crypto industry will not be relaxed due to the Trump administration’s promise
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Caroline Pham, Acting Chair of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), said at the Coinbase Annual Summit that despite the Trump administration's open attitude toward cryptocurrencies, regulators will not relax compliance requirements for the industry. She emphasized that "supporting innovation does not mean condoning illegal behavior," and the CFTC will focus on combating market fraud rather than convicting specific asset classes or technologies themselves. (Cointelegraph) 
Previous news, Trump's latest speech said that creating a strategic reserve of Bitcoin is not enough, and vowed to establish a "clear and simple market framework" to ensure the United States' dominance in Bitcoin and cryptocurrency.

data.title: JD Group executives: It is recommended to use offshore RMB stablecoins to promote the internationalization of the RMB
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News JD Group Chief Economist Shen Jianguang and JD Group Senior Research Director Zhu Taihui published an article in the China Economic Times hosted by the Development Research Center of the State Council, "Promoting the Internationalization of the RMB with Offshore RMB Stablecoins". The article pointed out that the issuance of RMB stablecoins is a new tool to meet the needs of the development trend of global stablecoins, to cope with the new US cryptocurrency policy, and to accelerate the internationalization of the RMB. The development of offshore RMB stablecoins is an important means to mitigate the impact of uncertainty in the development of the "digital currency bridge" and will not affect the monetary policy regulation and cross-border capital management in the Mainland.
In terms of the development rhythm, a gradual model is adopted. After accumulating experience and improving mechanisms in Hong Kong, it will be gradually promoted from Hong Kong to the Mainland Free Trade Zone and Free Trade Port in accordance with the model of "first offshore and then offshore", thereby continuously strengthening the support for the internationalization of the RMB. In order to achieve controllable risks, the user population can first be limited to institutional clients and "qualified investors", and then gradually open to retail users and the general public. (China Economic Times)

data.title: A whale deposited 1,000 bitcoins into Binance two hours ago
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, whale 12d1e4 deposited 1,000 BTC ($106.06 million) to Binance 2 hours ago.
This whale has been selling BTC since April 3, 2024-a total of 6,500 BTC ($585 million) was sold, while still holding 3,500 BTC ($363.5 million).

data.title: Iran: Will respond to those who planned and supported the attack
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Iran said it would respond to the attacks by the planners and supporters. (Jinshi)

data.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Vows Severe Repercussions for Israel
data.description: According to Odaily, Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has issued a statement following an attack by Israel, declaring that Israel will face severe punishment. This announcement was reported by Iran's state television.

data.title: Iran's Supreme Leader to Address Nation Following Israeli Attack
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Iran's Supreme Leader is set to deliver a statement following an attack by Israel, as reported by Iranian state television.

data.title: The crypto market suffered a heavy blow, ETH fell more than 10%, and BTC fell below $104,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, affected by the escalation of the situation in the Middle East, Israel's attack on Iran and other factors, the crypto market sector fell across the board, with a general decline of about 3% to 13%. Among them, Ethereum (ETH) fell by 10.07% in 24 hours, falling below $2,500, and Bitcoin (BTC) fell by 4.42%, falling below $104,000.
In other sectors, the CeFi sector fell 3.63% in 24 hours, but LEO Token (LEO) was relatively strong, up 1.30%; the PayFi sector fell 6.77%, Keeta (KTA), which had a large increase in the previous period, fell 22.55%, the Layer1 sector fell 7.88%, Cardano (ADA), Solana (SOL), Sui (SUI) fell 10.93%, 11.40%, 12.64% respectively; the GameFi sector fell 10.64%, but boosted by rumors that Tencent plans to acquire Nexon, the developer of "MapleStory" for US$15 billion, NEXPACE (NXPC) rose 8.20% against the trend; the Meme sector fell 11.71%, Pepe (PEPE) and Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) fell 14.55% and 18.62% respectively, the DeFi sector fell 11.73%, and the Layer2 sector fell 13.02%.
At the same time, the crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market trends of the sector, shows that the ssiDeFi, ssiAI, and ssiLayer2 indexes fell by 13.47%, 13.40%, and 13.34% respectively in 24 hours.

data.title: Israeli military: Iran's nuclear program has accelerated significantly in recent years, and the Iranian regime is approaching a point of no return
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - The Israeli military said that in recent months, the accumulated intelligence information has provided evidence that the Iranian regime is approaching a point of no return. In recent years, Iran's nuclear program has accelerated significantly, allowing Tehran to take an important step towards obtaining nuclear weapons. (Jinshi)

data.title: SEC Officially Repeals Gary Gensler-Era Proposal for DeFi and Custody
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission formally withdrew several proposed rules on Thursday that would have imposed stricter regulation on DeFi and cryptocurrency custody.
The proposals were made under the leadership of former Chairman Gary Gensler, who led the agency's "enforcement supervision" approach. The repealed proposals include proposed revisions to Rule 3b-16 of the Exchange Act, which was issued in April 2023. The proposal seeks to expand the definition of an exchange, specifically to include decentralized financial platforms under the regulation of national securities exchanges. The proposal has drawn criticism from all sides of the industry. (The Block)
